calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Linda Swanson for Glendon Miskel.

The Court stated that the fees were high. Ms. Swanson explained the extent of services provided to support the fee request. The Court stated that the services done are awarded but at the Attorney rate. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Various Bailiffs.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
